description: Short labeled ATC snippets used by scripts/diagnostic.py as a proof-of-life check for the fine-tuned Whisper transcriber. Chosen to be brief (~2-4 s each) so the whole diagnostic runs in seconds.
source: ATCO2 1h public test set (luigisaetta subset), validation split. Provided for research/diagnostic use under the ATCO2 corpus terms.

snippets.reference: roger station calling please pass your message
Hotel Echo X-ray number one runway two five
thank you QNH is one zero two three
one six right cleared to land Rex Sixty One Thirty Four
tower Bauhinia Two Zero One Seven established ILS three four left
